case_title: JIHYEON YOON VS. THE GAYLORD HOTEL, LLC

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT THE GAYLORD HOTEL, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOON, JIHYEON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE GAYLORD HOTEL, LLC $940.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,005.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
